prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan SR20DET (red top, 205ps variant) with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, Tomei 260° cams, and a N1 oil pump for high-RPM reliability, paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring a Fujitsubo GSpec muffler and unequal-length headers for optimized scavenging

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Nismo 4.111 final drive ratio, Cusco 1.5-way limited-slip differential, and a custom driveshaft with upgraded CV joints from a Nissan Silvia S14 to handle increased torque

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (Rasheen-specific valving), Whiteline front sway bar (22mm adjustable), and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1003K) for the rear trailing arms to eliminate compliance
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Rasheen-specific Rocket Bunny RB-W001 kit (modified to fit the Rasheen’s unique chassis), paired with carbon fiber overfenders from Seibon (part #CF-NIS-RASHEEN-FR/RE)

OEM+ restomod interior featuring Recaro SRD seats (retrimmed in Nismo red/black Alcantara), a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel with a Nismo quick-release hub, and a custom gauge cluster with Defi Advance BF series boost, oil pressure, and wideband AFR gauges

Aggressive front-end styling with a custom 3D-printed splitter (modeled after the Nissan R34 GT-R’s C-West design), JDM-spec Nissan Rasheen fog light delete plates (painted matte black), and a custom rear diffuser from Varis (modified to fit the Rasheen’s rear bumper)
